en.summary: The Prophet Muhammad (S) warns that a servant of Allah may be held back from entering Paradise for up to a hundred years due to a single sin, all while watching his wives and brothers already enjoying its blessings. This hadith was transmitted through the chain of Imams from Imam Ali (AS), emphasizing the severity of sins and the anguish of being excluded from Paradise while seeing others within it.

key_terms.ليحبس: Will be imprisoned/held back - detained from entering Paradise
key_terms.ذنب: Sin - a transgression that delays entry to Paradise
key_terms.الجنة: Paradise - the ultimate reward for the believers

en.seo_question: Can a person be delayed from entering Paradise because of sins?

ur.summary: نبی کریم صلی اللہ علیہ وآلہ نے خبردار کیا کہ ایک گناہ کی وجہ سے بندے کو سو سال جنت سے روکا جا سکتا ہے۔
ur.seo_question: کیا گناہ کی وجہ سے جنت میں داخلے میں تاخیر ہو سکتی ہے؟

tr.summary: Hz. Peygamber (s.a.a.) bir günahın kulu yüz yıl cennetten alıkoyabileceğini uyarmıştır.
tr.seo_question: Günah sebebiyle cennete giriş gecikir mi?

fa.summary: پیامبر خدا (ص) هشدار داد که یک گناه می‌تواند بنده را صد سال از بهشت بازدارد.
fa.seo_question: آیا گناه می‌تواند ورود به بهشت را به تأخیر بیندازد؟

id.summary: Nabi Muhammad (saw) memperingatkan bahwa satu dosa dapat menahan hamba dari surga selama seratus tahun.

bn.summary: নবী মুহাম্মাদ (স.) সতর্ক করেছেন যে একটি পাপ বান্দাকে একশত বছর জান্নাত থেকে আটকে রাখতে পারে।
bn.seo_question: পাপের কারণে কি জান্নাতে প্রবেশ বিলম্বিত হতে পারে?

es.summary: El Profeta Muhammad (P) advierte que un pecado puede retener a un siervo del Paraíso durante cien años.
es.seo_question: ¿Puede un pecado retrasar la entrada al Paraíso?

fr.summary: Le Prophète Muhammad (P) avertit qu'un péché peut retenir un serviteur du Paradis pendant cent ans.
fr.seo_question: Un péché peut-il retarder l'entrée au Paradis ?

de.summary: Der Prophet Muhammad (F) warnt, dass eine Sünde einen Diener hundert Jahre vom Paradies fernhalten kann.
de.seo_question: Kann eine Sünde den Eintritt ins Paradies verzögern?

ru.summary: Пророк Мухаммад (С) предупреждает, что один грех может задержать раба от Рая на сто лет.
ru.seo_question: Может ли грех задержать вход в Рай?

zh.summary: 先知穆罕默德（愿主福安之）警告，一项罪过可能使仆人被阻挡在天堂之外一百年。
zh.seo_question: 罪过能否延迟进入天堂？

isnad_matn.isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ زِيَادِ بْنِ الْجَعْفَرِ الْهَمَدَانِيُّ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَلِيٌّ ابْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ هَاشِمٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ الْمُغِيرَةِ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِيلَ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنِ الصَّادِقِ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ آبَائِهِ عَنْ عَلِيٍّ عَلَيْهِمُ السَّلَامُ قَالَ
isnad_matn.matn_ar: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ إِنَّ الْعَبْدَ لَيُحْبَسُ عَلَى ذَنْبٍ مِنْ ذُنُوبِهِ مِائَةَ عَامٍ وَإِنَّهُ لَيَنْظُرُ إِلَى أَزْوَاجِهِ وَإِخْوَانِهِ فِي الْجَنَّةِ

narrators.name_ar: أَحْمَدُ بْنُ زِيَادِ بْنِ الْجَعْفَرِ الْهَمَدَانِيُّ
narrators.name_en: Ahmad ibn Ziyad ibn al-Ja'far al-Hamadani
narrators.known_identity: Ahmad ibn Ziyad ibn Ja'far al-Hamadani, student of al-Saduq
Ali ibn Ibrahim al-Qummi (d. ~329 AH), famous Shia scholar
Ibrahim ibn Hashim al-Qummi, father of Ali ibn Ibrahim
Abdullah ibn al-Mughira al-Bajali, famous reliable narrator

narrators.ambiguity_note: Multiple narrators with this name; likely Isma'il ibn Muslim al-Sukuni based on chain context

narrators.known_identity: Imam Ja'far al-Sadiq (AS), the sixth Imam (d. 148 AH)
Imam Muhammad al-Baqir (AS), the fifth Imam (d. 114 AH)
The chain of Imams back to Imam Ali (AS)
Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (AS), the first Imam (d. 40 AH)

key_phrases.phrase_en: will be imprisoned for a sin

similar_content_hints.description: Hadiths about the punishment of delay from entering Paradise due to sins
Narrations about the severity of individual sins and their consequences in the afterlife
